measurement_note: Size is the decoded tape length D. Starting from the two-letter tape ab, each digit 2 doubles it. Reverse length arithmetic works in O(log D) encoding time and constant space, while a correct materialization baseline explicitly appends all D letters.

cases.name: benchmark: resolve the final character of 128 decoded letters
benchmark: resolve the final character of 2048 decoded letters
benchmark: resolve the final character of 32768 decoded letters
